title: C Memory Outcomes, Evidence, and Toolchain Boundaries · Memory Trace: C23 Version Contract
summary: A civic sensor team must distinguish a passing browser model from evidence that its native C release is safe on supported targets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem c23 version contract increment in memory-safety evidence and transfer matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin ISO/IEC 9899:2024, reviewed implementation support, diagnostics, extensions, and target ABI as a compatibility contract.
Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict C23 Version Contract · Theory C23 Version Contract
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 4327. Produce bounded C evidence to separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.

steps.title: Build C23 Version Contract evidence · Theory C23 Version Contract
steps.instruction:
For this theory demonstration of cmem-c23-version-contract, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-c23-version-contract-1tb8ae */" for changed case 3996. It must separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.
